description: Cognizant30 — 30 Cognizant Technology Services delivery scenarios

cases.title: TriZetto Facets Claims Portal Login Failure
cases.description: Healthcare client TriZetto Facets claims portal returns login error for 40 Cognizant BPO agents in Chennai. SAML assertion expired after IdP cert rotation last night.

cases.title: Client Salesforce Sandbox Deployment Stuck
cases.description: Salesforce sandbox refresh for retail banking client stuck at 78% for 6 hours. Deployment pipeline shows metadata API timeout. Release blocked for UAT sign-off Friday.

cases.title: Cognizant VPN Zscaler Blocking Client Jira
cases.description: Zscaler policy update blocks Cognizant consultants from reaching client Jira at client-bank.atlassian.net. Split tunnel rule missing for new client VLAN.

cases.title: Oracle EBS Concurrent Manager Down
cases.description: Oracle EBS concurrent manager CM-AR-IN stopped on client ERP instance. Accounts receivable batch jobs pending for 200 invoices. Cognizant AMS team cannot restart from OAM.

cases.title: Phishing Email Targeting Cognizant Delivery Managers
cases.description: Security incident: Cognizant delivery managers received spear phishing with fake client SOW attachment. Three managers opened macro-enabled document before SOC alert.

cases.title: New Consultant AD and Badge Provisioning Pune
cases.description: Need AD accounts, MFA enrollment, and building badge access for 25 new Cognizant consultants joining Pune DC2 on Monday for insurance client program.

cases.title: SQL Server Replication Lag on Client Data Mart
cases.description: SQL Server transactional replication lag exceeded 60 minutes on client insurance data mart. Cognizant analytics dashboards showing stale policy counts.

cases.title: ServiceNow CMDB Sync Job HTTP 500
cases.description: Cognizant internal ServiceNow CMDB sync job returns HTTP 500 when importing Azure VM inventory from Hyderabad integration account. 3,000 CIs out of date.

cases.title: Laptop Docking Station USB-C Not Charging
cases.description: Cognizant developer laptop Dell 7420 not charging through USB-C dock in Kolkata ODC. Battery at 6%. Need replacement dock before client demo at 4 PM.

cases.title: MPLS WAN Packet Loss to Client Data Center
cases.description: MPLS WAN circuit between Cognizant Hyderabad campus and client banking DC showing 8% packet loss. RDP sessions to client mainframe emulator dropping.

cases.title: SharePoint Client Deliverable Library Access Denied
cases.description: Cannot upload sprint deliverables to client SharePoint document library CT-INSURANCE-SPRINT12 — access denied despite project team membership.

cases.title: Snowflake Warehouse Query Timeout
cases.description: Snowflake compute warehouse WH_ANALYTICS timing out on client retail ETL queries after cluster resize. Cognizant data engineers blocked on month-end close.

cases.title: Power BI Gateway Offline Chennai ODC
cases.description: On-premises Power BI data gateway CTZ-CHN-GW01 offline since 2 AM. All client healthcare dashboards failed refresh for morning standup.

cases.title: GitHub Actions Secret Leaked in Build Log
cases.description: Security incident: Cognizant client CI pipeline log printed Azure service principal secret in plain text. Secret needs immediate rotation and git history purge.

cases.title: Okta MFA Device Reset for Offshore Lead
cases.description: Cognizant offshore delivery lead lost YubiKey. Okta MFA reset needed for client VPN and Confluence access before steering committee call.

cases.title: Docker Desktop Blocked by HVCI on Dev Laptop
cases.description: Docker Desktop cannot start on Cognizant developer laptop — Hypervisor blocked by HVCI policy after Windows 11 patch. Local microservices stack needed for client API work.

cases.title: F5 Load Balancer 502 on Client Portal
cases.description: F5 load balancer returns 502 Bad Gateway for client insurance member portal during open enrollment. Cognizant L2 team sees unhealthy pool members.

cases.title: MongoDB Atlas Connection Pool Exhausted
cases.description: MongoDB Atlas cluster for client loyalty application showing connection pool exhausted. Mobile API returning 503 for 15,000 concurrent users.

cases.title: Blue Prism RPA Bot Scheduler Crash
cases.description: Blue Prism RPA control room scheduler crashes on startup after .NET runtime update. 18 client finance automation bots not running since morning.

cases.title: Veeam Backup Job Failed on Client File Server
cases.description: Veeam backup job for client file server FS-LEGAL-01 failed — backup chain broken, repository volume full. Legal hold documents at risk.

cases.title: GlobalProtect VPN Certificate Expiring
cases.description: Cognizant GlobalProtect VPN SSL certificate expires in 36 hours. Need renewal on Palo Alto portal before 12,000 offshore staff lose client network access.

cases.title: SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Workflow Stuck
cases.description: SAP SuccessFactors onboarding workflow stuck at background check step for 80 new hires. Integration to third-party screening API returns HTTP 504.

cases.title: Postgres Deadlock on Client Policy Admin DB
cases.description: PostgreSQL policy admin database showing recurring deadlocks on endorsement table. Cognizant testers cannot complete regression suite.

cases.title: Unauthorized USB on Cognizant Dev VLAN
cases.description: Security incident: NAC quarantined unauthorized USB storage on Cognizant development VLAN. Developer attempted copy of client source code to personal drive.

cases.title: Intune Compliance Block on iPad Field Auditor
cases.description: Cognizant field auditor iPad blocked by Intune compliance — jailbreak detection false positive. Cannot access client audit checklist app on site.

cases.title: Azure AD Conditional Access Blocks Teams
cases.description: Azure AD Conditional Access policy blocks Microsoft Teams login for Cognizant consultants on personal hotspot. Error AADSTS53003 on client bridge calls.

cases.title: Kafka Consumer Lag on Client Event Stream
cases.description: Kafka consumer group lag exceeded 2 million messages on client payment event topic. Cognizant streaming team reports downstream fraud alerts delayed.

cases.title: Cognizant Vantage GenAI API Rate Limit
cases.description: Cognizant Vantage internal GenAI API returning 429 rate limit errors for code-assist plugin. 500 developers in Pune blocked on client modernization sprint.

cases.title: Ransomware Alert on Cognizant Project Share
cases.description: Security incident: CrowdStrike detected ransomware encryption on Cognizant project file share CTZ-PROJ-ARCHIVE. Multiple .locked files on client deliverable archive.

cases.title: Mainframe Emulator Session Disconnects
cases.description: Client mainframe emulator session disconnects every 12 minutes over Cognizant Mumbai WAN link. WFICA32 error during core banking regression testing.
